items.title: All three of New York's two way contracts are free agents (Kevin McCullar, Trey Jemison, and two-time NBA champion Dillon Jones)
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
All three of New York's two way contracts are free agents (Kevin McCullar, Trey Jemison, and two-time NBA champion Dillon Jones)

Tyler Nickel shoots better than all of them and could be taking one of those spots.
